steps.title: Identify the substantive difference
steps.content: Release depicts Nelson Mandela (a human subject); Digital Orca depicts a whale. This subject matter difference is the defining contrast in the notes.

steps.title: Match the choices to this contrast
steps.content:
The correct response directly captures the contrast: Release depicts a human subject, unlike Digital Orca.
  • A incorrectly treats location as a contrast even though both sculptures are in public places
  • B describes a shared characteristic rather than a difference
  • D focuses only on Digital Orca without establishing any comparison


That confirms C is correct.
